description.value:
Trigger At least two living creatures are in the room for more than a minute

Effect The dolls in the cabinet begin to shake and shudder, filling the area with a feeling of overwhelming dread about what might happen next. Each living creature who can see the cabinet must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:20|options:inflicts:frightened] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 2} on a critical failure). The haunt then rolls initiative.

details.description: Three shelves inside a dusty cabinet each hold a row of dolls infused with the Doll House's malevolent spiritual energy.
details.disable: @Check[occultism|dc:16] (trained) or @Check[religion|dc:16] (trained) to calm the spirits of one of three shelves in the cabinet
details.reset: The haunt deactivates 1 minute after all living creatures have left the area or when the soulbound dolls in the northwestern cabinet are destroyed. After 1 hour, the haunt is ready to trigger again. Putting Thalleus's spirit to rest permanently destroys the haunt.
details.routine: (3 actions) For each shelf that remains, the haunt takes 1 action to target a living, non-construct creature in the room. Phantom dolls escape from the cabinet to rush that creature, clamber over them, and punch, kick, and bite them. The target takes @Damage[(1d6+2)[spirit]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:17|basic] save).
